title: gladiolus clivorum
intro: Gladiolus clivorum, also known as the Naked Lady, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family and is native to South Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, thanks to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Gladiolus clivorum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, but it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using it as a treatment.
